CustomField.description: If the initial seller would like an additional description added to the closing documents, add it here. The result will be between two commas. For example: "a New Jersey limited liability company" - enter without quotes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the initial seller would like an additional description added to the closing documents, add it here. The result will be between two commas. For example: "a New Jersey limited liability company" - enter without quotes.
CustomField.label: Initial Seller Description
